use_cases: Display client or partner logos in a continuous scrolling animation on a homepage or about page.
Showcase brand logos as social proof to build trust with potential customers.
Highlight supported technologies or integrations in a visually engaging way.
Create a testimonial or collaboration section with partner branding.
ai_summary: A responsive marquee component that infinitely scrolls logos horizontally with customizable speed controls and hover-to-pause functionality. Built with shadcn/ui theming, it features a header section with title and description, and displays logos with gradient color schemes in a seamless loop animation. Designed for showcasing client logos, partner brands, or technology integrations as social proof on any landing page or dashboard section.
